SQLLite.SQL: SELECT COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ AS "COEventSeq", COE.CO_NUMBER AS "CONumber", COE.STD_EVENT_ID AS "StandardEventId", COE.USERNAME AS "UserName", COE.ALD_DEBT_SEQ AS "DebtSeqNumber", COE.ERROR_INDICATOR AS "ErrorInd" FROM CO_EVENTS COE WHERE COE.CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND COE.ALD_DEBT_SEQ = ${param.debtSeq} AND COE.STD_EVENT_ID = ${param.coEventId} AND ROWNUM = 1 ORDER BY COE.EVENT_DATE DESC, COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ DESC FOR UPDATE

Security.roles: medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper
